race.description: Omoda Jaecoo Gosford Midway Maiden Hcp
race.comment: CHATAIGNE (5) no match for the classy Satono Glow on debut when a plugging third over 1000m at Warwick Farm. That from has since been franked and can get the job done today from the low draw. Tongue-tie goes on and gets every chance here. SHALASH (11) two-year-old Xtravagant filly out of Windrunner on debut for the Adam Duggan yard. Trained on the track and has impressed in both trials. Key jockey booking from an inside gate and shapes as the main danger. BEYOND THE REEF (7) Flying Artie filly out of Miss Moana on debut for the Sargent yard. Showed enough in her only trial when second over 740m at Randwick. Has the upside to take a hand in the finish. BOLD BUCKS (4) slow into stride on debut with a plugging fourth over 1000m at Scone. Further improved heading into this and sure to be thereabouts. The chances don't end there.
